description_long: This jewelry object is a highly ornate necklace featuring a complex arrangement of gold and white elements, interspersed with numerous faceted gemstones. The design is circular, with a central red gemstone pendant that hangs below the main body, drawing attention as a focal point. Surrounding the necklace are multiple geometric and floral-inspired motifs, each set with smaller stones and intricate goldwork. The necklace appears to be constructed from a combination of polished gold, white enamel or ceramic, and several red and clear gemstones. The overall structure is both symmetrical and elaborate, suggesting a luxurious and ceremonial piece. The necklace is likely intended for formal occasions, given its size, detail, and opulent materials.
description: An elaborate gold and white necklace with a central red gemstone pendant, featuring intricate geometric and floral motifs set with multiple gemstones.
description_view_0: Front view shows the central red gemstone pendant and the symmetrical arrangement of gold and white motifs, with the necklace's ornate detailing most visible.
description_view_1: This view highlights the left side of the necklace, revealing the layered structure and the distribution of gemstones along the curve.
description_view_2: The back view displays the rear curvature and the continuation of the decorative motifs, with the central pendant partially visible.
description_view_3: Right-side view emphasizes the three-dimensional layering of the necklace and the way the motifs wrap around the form.
